role: Scaffolds for the 4 GnuSettingsApp pages Central did not cover (Displays/Input/Services/Developer). The other 4 of the 8-page app map to existing sections.

page_map_8.Developer: scaffold (this file · 2 flags tied to live engine state)

note: Generic renderer in Central: one template (toggle/select/slider/status rows) drives all 4 pages from appPageControls; portal health derives from the compositor capture+experimental, identical to compositor_profile.rs.
